name: factor-mining-agent-key-demo
description: Demo Codex plugin for the direct vt_ Agent API Key Factor Mining workflow.

interface.shortDescription: Demo the direct vt_ Agent API Key flow for backtested plugin.py factors.
interface.longDescription: A Codex demo plugin for the traditional Factor Mining local-agent flow: enter a vt_ Agent API Key locally, let Codex write plugin.py from a public task or custom idea, upload the factor, wait for the backtest, retrieve artifacts, and summarize results.
defaultPrompt: Show me the Factor Mining public task list with the Demo.
Use the Factor Mining Demo with my custom factor idea.
Switch the Factor Mining Demo to a different vt_ key.
Resume my Factor Mining Demo run and summarize results.
